title: Phase 6 Review Request
description: Written by the worker to .sc4sap/program/{PROG}/review-request.json before launching review-checklist.md in a fresh context. Tells the read-only reviewer which spec version, which system, which transport, and which objects to review.

spec_sha256.description: SHA-256 (lowercase hex) of the approved spec.md. Must equal approval.json.spec_sha256.

sid.description: SAP system ID the objects were created on.

client.description: SAP client the objects were created on.

transport.description: Transport request the created objects are recorded on.

objects.description: Every object created/updated in Phase 4, with its type, so the reviewer fetches each source.

type.description: Object type, e.g. PROG/P (program), PROG/I (include), DYNP (screen), CUAD (GUI status), FUGR, CLAS, TABL, DTEL, DOMA.

prog.description: Main program name (optional convenience field; also derivable from objects[]).

iteration.description: Review iteration number (1-3). A re-review after MAJOR fixes increments this (optional).
